scripts.dev: pnpm build:widget && cp apps/widget/dist/leadbot.js apps/web/public/widget/ 2>/dev/null || true && pnpm dev:web
scripts.build: pnpm db:generate && pnpm build:widget && cp apps/widget/dist/leadbot.js apps/web/public/widget/ 2>/dev/null || true && pnpm --filter shared build && pnpm --filter web build
scripts.build:full: pnpm build:widget && cp apps/widget/dist/leadbot.js apps/web/public/widget/ && pnpm --filter shared build && pnpm --filter web build
